children.heading: State and local governmental exemption
children.label: a State and local governmental exemption
children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, no tax shall be imposed by section 4481 on the use of any highway motor vehicle by any State or any political subdivision of a State.

children.heading: Exemption for United States
children.label: b Exemption for United States
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury may authorize exemption from the tax imposed by section 4481 as to the use by the United States of any particular highway motor vehicle, or class of highway motor vehicles, if he determines that the imposition of such tax with respect to such use will cause substantial burden or expense which can be avoided by granting tax exemption and that full benefit of such exemption, if granted, will accrue to the United States.

children.heading: Certain transit-type buses
children.label: c Certain transit-type buses
children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, no tax shall be imposed by section 4481 on the use of any bus which is of the transit type (rather than of the intercity type) by a person who, for the last 3 months of the preceding year (or for such other period as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe for purposes of this subsection), met the 60-percent passenger fare revenue test set forth in section 6421(b)(2) (as in effect on the day before the date of the enactment of the Energy Tax Act of 1978) as applied to the period prescribed for purposes of this subsection.

children.heading: Exemption for trucks used for less than 5,000 miles on public highways
children.label: d Exemption for trucks used for less than 5,000 miles on public highways
i
children.text: it is reasonable to expect that the use of any highway motor vehicle on public highways during any taxable period will be less than 5,000 miles, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the owner of such vehicle furnishes such information as the Secretary may by forms or regulations require with respect to the expected use of such vehicle,

children.heading: Suspension ceases to apply where use exceeds 5,000 miles
children.label: B Suspension ceases to apply where use exceeds 5,000 miles
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall cease to apply with respect to any highway motor vehicle whenever the use of such vehicle on public highways during the taxable period exceeds 5,000 miles.

children.label: A
children.text: the collection of the tax imposed by section 4481 with respect to any highway motor vehicle is suspended under paragraph (1),

children.label: B
children.text: such vehicle is not used during the taxable period on public highways for more than 5,000 miles, and

children.label: C
children.text: except as otherwise provided in regulations, the owner of such vehicle furnishes such information as the Secretary may require with respect to the use of such vehicle during the taxable period,

children.heading: Refund where tax paid and vehicle not used for more than 5,000 miles
children.label: 3 Refund where tax paid and vehicle not used for more than 5,000 miles
A
children.text: the tax imposed by section 4481 is paid with respect to any highway motor vehicle for any taxable period, and

children.label: B
children.text: the requirements of subparagraphs (B) and (C) of paragraph (2) are met with respect to such taxable period,

children.heading: Relief from liability for tax under certain circumstances where truck is transferred
children.label: 4 Relief from liability for tax under certain circumstances where truck is transferred
A
children.text: such vehicle is transferred to a new owner,

children.label: B
children.text: such suspension is in effect at the time of such transfer, and

children.label: C
children.text: the old owner furnishes such information as the Secretary by forms and regulations requires with respect to the transfer of such vehicle.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In the case of an agricultural vehicle, paragraphs (1) and (2) shall be applied by substituting “7,500” for “5,000” each place it appears.

children.label: I
children.text: used primarily for farming purposes, and

children.label: II
children.text: registered (under the laws of the State in which such vehicle is required to be registered) as a highway motor vehicle used for farming purposes.

children.heading: Farming purposes
children.label: ii Farming purposes
children.text: The term “farming purposes” means the transporting of any farm commodity to or from a farm or the use directly in agricultural production.

children.heading: Farm commodity
children.label: iii Farm commodity
children.text: The term “farm commodity” means any agricultural or horticultural commodity, feed, seed, fertilizer, livestock, bees, poultry, fur-bearing animals, or wildlife.

children.heading: Owner defined
children.label: 6 Owner defined
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “owner” means, with respect to any highway motor vehicle, the person described in section 4481(b).

children.heading: Reduction in tax for trucks used in logging
children.label: e Reduction in tax for trucks used in logging

children.text: the exclusive use of such vehicle during any taxable period is the transportation, to and from a point located on a forested site, of products harvested from such forested site, and
such vehicle is registered (under the laws of the State in which such vehicle is required to be registered) as a highway motor vehicle used in the transportation of harvested forest products.

children.heading: Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 108–357, title VIII, § 867(d)118 Stat. 1622Oct. 22, 2004
children.label: f Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 108–357, title VIII, § 867(d)118 Stat. 1622Oct. 22, 2004

children.heading: Exemption for mobile machinery
children.label: g Exemption for mobile machinery
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by section 4481 on the use of any vehicle described in section 4053(8).

children.heading: Exemption for vehicles used in blood collection
children.label: h Exemption for vehicles used in blood collection

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by section 4481 on the use of any qualified blood collector vehicle by a qualified blood collector organization.

children.heading: Qualified blood collector vehicle
children.label: 2 Qualified blood collector vehicle
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “qualified blood collector vehicle” means a vehicle at least 80 percent of the use of which during the prior taxable period was by a qualified blood collector organization in the collection, storage, or transportation of blood.

children.heading: Special rule for vehicles first placed in service in a taxable period
children.label: 3 Special rule for vehicles first placed in service in a taxable period
children.text: In the case of a vehicle first placed in service in a taxable period, a vehicle shall be treated as a qualified blood collector vehicle for such taxable period if such qualified blood collector organization certifies to the Secretary that the organization reasonably expects at least 80 percent of the use of such vehicle by the organization during such taxable period will be in the collection, storage, or transportation of blood.

children.heading: Qualified blood collector organization
children.label: 4 Qualified blood collector organization
children.text: The term “qualified blood collector organization” has the meaning given such term by section 7701(a)(49).

children.heading: Termination of exemptions
children.label: i Termination of exemptions
children.text: Subsections (a) and (c) shall not apply on and after .October 1, 2029
